title: Come on Dance
lyrics: I feel like it's a great night of win, I feel like I'm gonna be there for you, for me, yeah Come on dance, come on dance, come on take this chance Come on dance, come on dance, come on make it last Come on dance with me, come on talk with me Come on show me we've got a chance at romance At night comes faster than you think when there's light around You've gotta protect your little spark of it all Cause you gotta remember that love for you And then let it fire free So come on with me to the floor of the new chapter Come on and let's work together I go left, you go left I go right, you go right I go up, dip, down And we do it all night So come on dance, come on dance, come on dance with me Come on dance, come on dance, come on last with me Come on dance with me, come on yeah take a shot And give ourselves another chance at romance Oh, now you're dancing baby, oh And you're looking like the thing that'll save this heart from the dark I can see a little light where you start, yeah come on And dance with me, come on, come on, come on, come on Dance, come on, let's Come on take the chance and dance with me Come on dance, come on Come on take the chance with me And come on dance, come on Come on, come on, come on, come on dance Come on dance, yeah Come on dance with me Tonight I say, come on Just a little bit will save everybody, yeah Save yourself, give it Come on dance, come on dance, come on, take that chance Come on dance, come on dance, come on, make it last Come on dance with me Come on walk with me Come on give us a last shot at romance Come on and take my hand, we're Going on the floor, gonna make it be Something we can recognize For eternity, the self-love The selfless thoughts and the Sweat around us, brows as we go on So come on dance, come on dance, come on, dance with me Come on dance, come on dance, come on, take the chance Come on dance with me Come on take the chance Come on it's a last shot at another romance Come on, come on, come on, come on, come on dance ...
